Dié Wu

Associate Professor
Sichuan Normal University
wd@sicnu.edu.cn
dwu.cse@gmail.com


Embeded AI

This page collects selected resources and research papers in Embedded AI, with particular attention to TinyML as one of its key subareas. It is intended for researchers, engineers, and developers who build intelligent systems under tight constraints in compute, memory, power, and latency.

The scope of this page covers both TinyML-oriented work and the broader Embedded AI landscape, including efficient models, hardware platforms, deployment systems, sensing-driven intelligence, and trustworthy edge intelligence.

To improve readability, papers are organized into a compact topic taxonomy. This makes it easier to browse the field by research direction instead of only by venue or keyword.

Useful Links

  • Awesome TinyML — A curated collection of TinyML resources, tools, tutorials, and research references.
  • Machine Learning on Embedded Devices — A practical reference on running machine learning workloads on embedded and resource-constrained devices.

Last Updated

April 15, 2026

Papers

TinyML Papers

Chip / Hardware

No papers have been added to this category yet.

Model / Algorithm

  • Rethinking Temporal Models for TinyML: LSTM versus 1D-CNN in Resource-Constrained Devices — arXiv (March 2026)
  • Neural Network Quantization for Microcontrollers: A Comprehensive Survey of Methods, Platforms, and Applications — arXiv (August 2025)

System / Deployment

  • Affordable Precision Agriculture: A Deployment-Oriented Review of Low-Cost, Low-Power Edge AI and TinyML for Resource-Constrained Farming Systems — arXiv (March 2026)
  • Energy-Aware Multi-Exit TinyML for Smart Zero-Energy Devices — arXiv (March 2026)
  • NanoCockpit: Performance-optimized Application Framework for AI-based Autonomous Nanorobotics — arXiv (January 2026)

Sensing / Application

  • Fully Autonomous Z-Score-Based TinyML Anomaly Detection on Resource-Constrained MCUs Using Power Side-Channel Data — arXiv (March 2026)
  • TinyML for Acoustic Anomaly Detection in IoT Sensor Networks — 2025 5th International Conference on Electrical, Computer, Communications and Mechatronics Engineering (ICECCME), Zanzibar, Tanzania, 2025, pp. 1-5 (March 2026)
  • TinyML-Enabled IoT for Sustainable Precision Irrigation — arXiv (January 2026)
  • Tiny Machine Learning for Real-Time Aquaculture Monitoring: A Case Study in Morocco — 2024 IEEE Global Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Internet of Things (GCAIoT), Dubai, UAE, 2024 (January 2026)
  • A Survey of TinyML Applications in Beekeeping for Hive Monitoring and Management — arXiv (September 2025)

Security / Reliability

No papers have been added to this category yet.

Model / Algorithm

  • SpikeNAS: A Fast Memory-Aware Neural Architecture Search Framework for Spiking Neural Network-based Embedded AI Systems — arXiv (2024)
